listings.name: Golden Dragon Feng Shui Consultancy
listings.description: Award-winning feng shui consultancy serving high-net-worth clients and Fortune 500 companies across three continents. Led by Master Chen Wei, a third-generation practitioner trained in both San Yuan and San He classical systems. Specialises in commercial property, luxury residential, and corporate office feng shui audits.

listings.name: Jade Pavilion BaZi Academy
listings.description: Premier BaZi education platform offering structured certification programmes from beginner to master level. Curriculum based on classical Xu Ziping texts with modern case studies. Over 5,000 graduates across 40 countries, with lifetime access to updated course materials and practitioner community.

listings.name: Five Elements Wellness Centre
listings.description: Integrative health clinic combining Traditional Chinese Medicine with Five Element constitutional diagnosis. Team of 12 licensed practitioners offering acupuncture, herbal prescriptions, cupping, and moxibustion. Recognised by the British Columbia College of TCM Practitioners with over 20 years of clinical excellence.

listings.name: International Feng Shui Guild (IFSG)
listings.description: Global professional body for feng shui practitioners. Maintains ethical standards, offers certification programmes, and connects clients with qualified consultants trained in classical methods.

listings.name: The Feng Shui Society
listings.description: The independent professional registering body for accredited feng shui consultants and teachers in the UK and Europe. Publishes educational resources and hosts annual conferences.

listings.name: Feng Shui Institute
listings.description: Provides professional feng shui training at Master and Consultant Practitioner levels. Maintains a directory of qualified graduates for public referrals.

listings.name: Mastery Academy of Chinese Metaphysics
listings.description: Founded by Joey Yap, the world’s largest Chinese metaphysics educational institution. Programmes in classical feng shui, BaZi, Qi Men Dun Jia, and Yi Jing with students in 30+ countries.

listings.name: American Feng Shui Institute
listings.description: Teaches classical compass-school feng shui rooted in the San Yuan and San He systems. Courses cover Luopan reading, Flying Stars (Xuan Kong), and landscape form assessment.

listings.name: Anjie Cho — Holistic Spaces
listings.description: Architect and feng shui consultant, author of Holistic Spaces: 108 Ways to Create a Mindful and Peaceful Home. Integrates classical feng shui principles with contemporary interior architecture.

listings.name: Feng Shui Concepts
listings.description: Founded by Jane Langof, an internationally accredited Feng Shui Master. Transforming homes and workplaces since 2008 using classical methods and compass-school techniques.

listings.name: Raymond Lo Feng Shui & Destiny
listings.description: Grand Master Raymond Lo offers feng shui and BaZi consultancy with over 40 years of practice in Flying Star and Four Pillars systems. Known internationally for annual Five Element forecasts.

listings.name: Feng Shui Research Center
listings.description: Founded in 1998 by Master Joseph Yu. Teaches genuine feng shui and Chinese astrology through rigorous study of classical texts, offering correspondence and in-person courses worldwide.

listings.name: Ms. Feng Shui (Jessie Kim)
listings.description: Third-generation feng shui expert specialising in residential and commercial consultations. Combines classical Chinese methods with modern design sensibility for contemporary living spaces.

listings.name: Dato Joey Yap Consulting Group
listings.description: One of the world’s largest Chinese metaphysics consultancies. Offers personal BaZi readings, corporate feng shui audits, and date selection for business events and property acquisitions.

listings.name: Imperial Harvest
listings.description: Founded by Master David Goh. Offers authentic Imperial Feng Shui and BaZi consultations alongside curated fine jadeite and agarwood feng shui treasures.

listings.name: BaZi Mastery Centre
listings.description: Dedicated to classical Xu Ziping methodology. Courses cover the Ten Gods, Day Master analysis, luck pillar reading, and advanced chart interpretation following pre-Qing textual sources.

listings.name: Feng Shui by Jen
listings.description: Jennifer Bonetto offers professional BaZi practitioner certification courses alongside classical feng shui consulting services for residential and commercial clients.

listings.name: China Institute
listings.description: Founded in 1926, America’s oldest bicultural organisation focused on China. Offers exhibitions on traditional arts, language programmes, and public lectures on Chinese philosophy and history.

listings.name: Asia Society
listings.description: International organisation with centres across Asia, America, and Europe. Promotes cross-cultural understanding through exhibitions, performances, and educational initiatives including Chinese calendar events.

listings.name: Chinese Culture Center of San Francisco
listings.description: Rooted in Chinatown since 1965. Uplifts communities through cultural arts, exhibitions, and education programmes celebrating Chinese and Chinese American heritage.

listings.name: Museum of Chinese in America (MOCA)
listings.description: Dedicated to preserving and presenting 160+ years of Chinese American experience. Houses a vast collection of artifacts, oral histories, and documents chronicling immigration and community life.

listings.name: Chinese American Museum of Chicago
listings.description: Founded in 2005. Advances appreciation of Chinese American culture, history, and heritage through exhibitions, educational programmes, and community research initiatives.

listings.name: Chinese Historical Society of America
listings.description: The oldest and largest organisation in the United States dedicated to documenting and preserving Chinese American history. Maintains extensive archives and rotating exhibitions.

listings.name: Chinese Cultural Centre (Singapore)
listings.description: Government-supported centre promoting Chinese heritage through exhibitions, festivals, and educational programmes. Hosts annual zodiac celebrations and traditional arts workshops.

listings.name: Lillian Too’s World of Feng Shui (WOFS)
listings.description: Founded by best-selling author Lillian Too. Flagship stores and online platform offering feng shui amulets, enhancers, cures, zodiac forecasts, and annual Flying Star guides.

listings.name: Mandarin Arts
listings.description: Specialist retailer of traditional Chinese art, calligraphy supplies, and zodiac-themed gifts. Carries Luopan compasses, feng shui remedies, and handcrafted Chinese New Year decorations.

listings.name: Inkston
listings.description: Founded in 2016, providing authentic Chinese calligraphy brushes, ink stones, xuan paper, and painting supplies sourced directly from traditional artisan workshops. Ships worldwide.

listings.name: FengshuiMall
listings.description: Dedicated online retailer offering authentic feng shui products including Luo Pan compasses, crystals, traditional Chinese ornaments, and seasonal cures for annual Flying Star remedies.

listings.name: Beijing Tong Ren Tang
listings.description: Founded in 1669, one of the world’s oldest and most prestigious TCM brands. Served eight imperial dynasties over 188 years. Operates clinics and pharmacies worldwide with rigorous quality standards.

listings.name: Eu Yan Sang
listings.description: Founded in 1879. Operates 170+ retail outlets and TCM clinics across Southeast Asia, offering herbal remedies, clinical consultations, acupuncture, and integrated wellness programmes.

listings.name: Ping Ming Health
listings.description: Australia’s trusted name in acupuncture and Traditional Chinese Medicine since 1992. Experienced practitioners offering herbal medicine, cupping therapy, and holistic health consultations.

listings.name: Qin’s Clinic
listings.description: One of the UK’s most respected TCM clinics, located on Harley Street. Offers expert acupuncture, herbal medicine prescriptions, and holistic pain relief rooted in classical Chinese medical tradition.

listings.name: Shaolin Tagou Martial Arts School
listings.description: The largest and one of the most prestigious kung fu academies in China, located near the Shaolin Temple. Has produced numerous national and international martial arts champions.

listings.name: Wudang Mountain Kung Fu Academy
listings.description: Located at Nanyan Temple in the Wudang Scenic Zone. Teaches traditional Wudang Tai Chi, Baguazhang, Xingyiquan, and Daoist Qigong in the birthplace of internal martial arts.

listings.name: Ving Tsun Athletic Association
listings.description: Established in 1967 by Grandmaster Ip Man and his senior students. The original Wing Chun organisation preserving the Ip Man lineage — the same tradition taught to Bruce Lee.

listings.name: U.S. Kuo Shu Academy
listings.description: Teaches traditional Yang and Chen style Tai Chi, Tien Shan Pai kung fu, push hands, and Chinese weapons forms with authentic lineage tracing back to classical Chinese martial traditions.
